/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/chord_settings.dir/ui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chord_settings.dir/core/progression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chord_settings.dir/ui/app_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chord_settings.dir/audio/audio_engine.cpp.o -o chord_settings  libimgui.a -framework OpenGL _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
